'''âm-f-h-p''' ('''kamafhepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wakf|wakf]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-f-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wakf|wakf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-f-h-p
|-
! Lemma
| kamafhepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimafhepoko|thimafhepoko]] || [[word:jimafhepoko|jimafhepoko]] || [[word:shimafhepoko|shimafhepoko]] || [[word:kimafhepoko|kimafhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumafhepoko|thuthumafhepoko]] || [[word:jujumafhepoko|jujumafhepoko]] || [[word:shushumafhepoko|shushumafhepoko]] || [[word:kukumafhepoko|kukumafhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumafhepoko|thumafhepoko]] || [[word:jumafhepoko|jumafhepoko]] || [[word:shumafhepoko|shumafhepoko]] || [[word:kumafhepoko|kumafhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumafhepoko|thumafhepoko]] || [[word:jumafhepoko|jumafhepoko]] || [[word:shumafhepoko|shumafhepoko]] || [[word:kumafhepoko|kumafhepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomafhepoko|thomafhepoko]] || [[word:jomafhepoko|jomafhepoko]] || [[word:shomafhepoko|shomafhepoko]] || [[word:komafhepoko|komafhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚmafhepoko|thĂŚmafhepoko]] || [[word:jĂŚmafhepoko|jĂŚmafhepoko]] || [[word:shĂŚmafhepoko|shĂŚmafhepoko]] || [[word:kĂŚmafhepoko|kĂŚmafhepoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamafhepoko|thamafhepoko]] || [[word:jamafhepoko|jamafhepoko]] || [[word:shamafhepoko|shamafhepoko]] || [[word:kamafhepoko|kamafhepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
